response.original_title: David Lynch: I Have a Radio
response.overview: Initially released as a bonus track on the Japanese and the deluxe edition of Crazy Clown Time, the second studio album of the American director and musician, David Lynch, the eerie music video for "I Have a Radio" incorporates elements of avant-garde soundscapes. Against the backdrop of hypnotic electronic tunes, and a stark, almost barren, charcoal-stained landscape, a pair of contrasting figures dance in unison to the music, swaying back and forth as synchronized Japanese subtitles decipher the minimalist lyrics.
response.tagline: Two animated figures dance to a minimalist song "I Have a Radio" by David Lynch.
response.title: David Lynch: I Have a Radio
